abilities.name: Catlike Reflexes
abilities.text: Once per activation. When a friendly model ends a move on terrain within 6", this model may place into base contact with the model.

abilities.name: Expert Climber
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may ignore vertical distance while resolving the Walk or Charge action.

abilities.name: Stealth
abilities.text: While more than 6" away from this model, enemy models cannot target it and ignore it when drawing LoS.

actions.name: Springing Strike
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action receives a (-) if the target is on Ht 2 terrain or higher.

triggers.name: Pouncing Strike
triggers.text: Place this model into base contact with a different enemy model within 5". Then, declare this action again, targeting that enemy model.

actions.name: Shelter in the Trees
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Another friendly model only. Place the target anywhere within range at a higher or lower elevation.

triggers.name: Draw Out Secrets
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

actions.name: Tenacity
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Discard a card. This model heals 2.
